description: Skill triggers on image classification fine-tuning request
prompt: Fine-tune a pretrained ResNet on my custom 10-class dataset using PyTorch

description: Skill triggers on YOLO object detection request
prompt: Run YOLO inference on a folder of images and print bounding boxes

description: Agent produces a correct albumentations augmentation pipeline
prompt: Write a PyTorch-compatible data augmentation pipeline for training an object detector

description: Agent exports a PyTorch model to ONNX with dynamic axes
prompt: Export a trained PyTorch image classifier to ONNX format for production deployment

description: Agent computes mAP for object detection evaluation
prompt: Compute mAP@0.5 and mAP@0.5:0.95 for my detection model predictions

description: Agent implements DeepLabV3 or U-Net for semantic segmentation
prompt: Implement semantic segmentation on a custom 5-class dataset using PyTorch

description: Agent writes a correct image preprocessing pipeline
prompt: Write a production image preprocessing pipeline that loads a batch of images and normalizes them

description: Agent applies different transforms to train vs val splits
prompt: Set up training and validation data loaders for image classification
note: Training uses RandomResizedCrop; val must not - validated separately by presence of CenterCrop for val

description: Agent recommends starting from pretrained weights, not from scratch
prompt: I have 2000 labeled images. Should I train a CNN from scratch or use transfer learning?

description: Agent uses two-phase training when fine-tuning
prompt: Fine-tune an EfficientNet classifier on a small dataset of 500 images per class

description: Agent does not invent non-existent torchvision or ultralytics APIs
prompt: Run YOLO11 inference and classify images with EfficientNet in PyTorch

description: Agent references model-zoo when asked to compare architectures
prompt: Which backbone should I use for a real-time object detection system on an edge GPU?
